full_text:
He Ding 何定
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
He Ding (何定). Abused his favor from Sun Hao to further his own power, eventually executed. He Ding was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. He Ding lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
